# Sweepsless in Seattle

> Professional house cleaning for Seattle and Eastside homes. No contracts, vetted in-house teams, flexible scheduling, and a satisfaction promise on every visit.

## Services

- [Regular Housekeeping](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/regular): Weekly, biweekly, or monthly cleaning visits covering kitchens, baths, floors, dusting, and general tidying. Designed around your schedule with custom notes tracked per visit.
- [One-Time / As-Needed Cleaning](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/once): Single-visit cleaning for pre-guest prep, post-travel resets, or whenever you need a one-off deep tidy. Same-week availability when schedule allows.
- [Deep / Spring Cleaning](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/deep): Thorough cleaning that reaches baseboards, window tracks, inside appliances, behind furniture, and all the spots regular maintenance skips. Ideal seasonally or before a big event.
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/move): Empty-home passes covering inside cabinets, appliance interiors, closet shelves, baseboards, and full floor care for inspections or fresh starts.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://sweepslessinseattle.com/services/post): Fine dust removal from all surfaces, HVAC vents, interior windows, and detailed floor cleaning after renovations. Coordinated with contractors for final pass.

## Why Choose Us

- No contracts — book on your terms, cancel anytime
- Vetted, in-house teams — background-checked, insured, consistently trained
- Flexible scheduling — easy rescheduling with clear communication
- Customized cleanings — priorities aligned to your home and preferences
- Satisfaction promise — if something misses the mark, we return to fix it

## About

Sweepsless in Seattle is a locally owned cleaning company serving homes across Seattle and the Eastside. Founded to fix the frustrations of rigid contracts, inconsistent teams, and surprise charges. Every policy exists because we experienced the opposite as customers and decided to do better. Our teams earn fair wages, work reasonable hours, and receive ongoing training.

## Service Area

Seattle, Capitol Hill, Ballard, Fremont, Green Lake, Queen Anne, Wallingford, Beacon Hill, Columbia City, Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, and the greater Eastside in Washington state.
